headline: Guy Orders 47 Different Types Of Cheese Online, Now His Fridge Is A 'Cheese Museum'
summary: He hosts 'Cheese Wednesday' where guests taste and rate each cheese. His friends are concerned.
fullBody: Jake McCheese ordered 47 artisanal cheeses from around the world. 'I'm building a collection,' Jake said. His fridge now has a 'cheese map' and a 'cheese journal.' He hosts 'Cheese Wednesday' where guests taste and rate each cheese. 'It's not a problem,' Jake insisted. His doctor has expressed concerns about his cholesterol. Jake is 'considering' adding a 'cheese exercise' routine.
